generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T <<<<< AMBRA. SEXUAL ORGANS. ► An itching pimple above the male parts of generation, [1] . ► Burning in the genital organs, with a few drops of blood being emitted, especially after a walk and hard stool, [1] . ► Vehement, voluptuously delightful feeling in the interior of the genital organs, without any considerable erection or irritation of the external organs; that feeling continues for hours (after four days), [1] . ► Violent erections, early on waking, without any voluptuous desire, the parts being externally numb; when the erection subsides there is a tingling-tearing in the forepart of the urethra, [1] . [250.] ► The erections subside (reaction), [1] . ► Pain in the glans, as from ulceration, [1] . ► Tearing in the glans, [1] . ► Itching of the glans, which continues when sitting, lying, standing or walking, [1] . ►► *Violent itching of the pudendum (less frequently of the anus); she has to rub the parts, [1] . ► *Soreness and itching of the pudendum, even when she does not urinate , [1] . ► *Swelling, soreness, and itching of the labia pudendi , [1] . ► Hemorrhage from the uterus (after two hours), [1] . ► Discharge of bluish-white clots of mucus from the vagina), [1] . ► (Profuse leucorrha at night), [1] . [260.] ► Leucorrha , consisting of thick mucus, increasing from day to day, each discharge being preceded by a stitch in the vagina, [1] . ► *The menses occur three days before the time (after fourth day), [1] . ► *The menses appear four days before the time (after twenty days), [1] . ► Sensation in the abdomen as if the menses would come on, although they had appeared twenty-one days ago (after two hours), [1] . ► During the menses the left leg becomes blue from distended veins, with a pressive pain, [1] . RESPIRATORY APPARATUS. ► Burning and itching titillation extending from the larynx down to the abdomen, [1] . ► *Cough only at night , produced by an excessive irritation in the throat; there is no cough by day, [1] . ► Cough excited by rawness of the throat, [2] . ► *Cough, every evening, with pain under the left ribs, as if something were torn loose there , [1] . ► *Nightly cough ; owing to an excessive irritation in the throat, [1] . [270.] ► Occasionally considerable paroxysms of cough , [1] . ► *Violent, convulsive cough, accompanied by frequent eructations and hoarseness , [1] . ► A kind of hooping-cough (after forty-eight hours), [1] . ► *Deep, dry cough, with accumulation of water in the mouth, and subsequent rawness in the throat, [2] . ► When coughing there is a pressure in the umbilical region, [1] . ► *Very saltish expectoration when coughing , [1] . ► Roughness and hoarseness of the voice; tenacious mucus collects in the throat, [1] . ► Hoarseness; rough, deep voice, alternating with thick phlegm in the larynx; he easily throws it up when clearing the throat, or by a slight cough (after ten and twenty-four hours), [1] . CHEST. ► Burning in the chest, [1] . ► Burning in the external parts of the chest, [2] . [280.] ► Burning ache near one of the ribs of the right side; it is aggravated by external pressure; afterwards a similar pain in the left mamma, [2] . ► *Sense of rawness in the chest , [1] . ► Stitch in the chest, extending to the back (after a few hours), [1] . ► Violent, dull stitch in the right mamma, interrupting respiration, [2] . ► *Wheezing in the chest , [1] . ► Oppression at the chest, [2] . ► Oppression in the back, through the chest, [1] . ► Oppression of the chest and back, between the scapulæ; it subsides for a short time after eating, [1] . ► Oppression of the chest, with much uneasiness the whole day (after third day), [1] . ► Tightness of the chest; she cannot breathe deeply, nor yawn fully, [1] . [290.] ► Feeling of pressure deep in the right half of the chest, during a strong expiration; the pressure is most painful at a small place, [2] . ► Pressure in the superior part of the chest, in paroxysms, for five minutes, [1] . ► Pressure on the upper part of the chest, [2] . ► Pressure below (in?) the left half of the chest, [1] . ► Pressure in the præcordial region, [2] . ► Aching in the chest, over the pit of the stomach, as if the parts had been beaten; relieved by eructations, [2] . ► Pain of the right lowermost true ribs, as if the parts had been bruised; more towards the back, [1] . ► Rheumatic pain in the right side of the chest, below the arm, [2] . ► *Tearing pressure in the left side of the chest , [2] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Palpitation of the heart, when walking in the open air, with paleness of the face, [1] . [300.] ► Violent palpitation of the heart, with pressure in the chest, as if a lump were lodged there, or as if the chest were obstructed, [1] . ► He perceives the pulse in the body; it feels like the tick of a watch, [1] . NECK AND BACK. ► Drawing ache in the nape of the neck, [2] . ► Rheumatic pain in the right scapula, [2] . ► Burning in the left scapula (first day), [1] . ► Pain in the back, as if the intestines were being compressed, with a heaviness in the back, on the right side, [2] . ► Stitches in the small of the back, when sitting (after eight or nine days), [1] . ► Single, violent, sharp stitches in the small of the back, increased by the slightest motion, [2] . ► Violent pressure in the lower part of the small of the back, [2] . [310.] ► Painful tension in the muscles of the loins, [1] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Twitchings in the limbs, [1] . ► Uncommon twitching in all the limbs, and coldness of the body at night (after fifth day), [1] . ► Uneasiness in all the limbs, like a tingling, accompanied by a sort of anguish, only by day, [1] . UPPER EXTREMITIES. ► The arms easily go to sleep, when lying on them, [1] . ► At night the right arm frequently feels numb, and goes to sleep, [1] . ► The left arm often goes to sleep during the day, when at rest, [1] . ► Tearing in both shoulders, [1] . ► Tearing in the left shoulder-joint , [2] . ► In the evening there is drawing in the shoulder; it feels sprained and paralyzed , [1] . [320.] ► Violent, dull stitch in the right shoulder (after two hours), [2] . ► Sense as of clucking in the arm, [1] . ► Twitchings in the arm, [1] . ► Tearing in the right arm, early, for five minutes, [1] . ► (Paralysis of the right upper arm), [1] . ► Tearing in the right elbow and forearm, [2] . ► Drawing ache in the right forearm as far as the elbow, [2] . ► Cramp in the hands (after some hours), [1] . ► Paralysis of the hand, for a few minutes (after sixth day), [1] . ► Icy cold hands for a long time (after one hour), [2] . [330.] ► Painful coldness of the hands for a long time, [2] . ► Icy coldness of the hands, in the evening; the hands feel chilly, [2] . ► Tearing in the interior of the middle portion of the right hand, [2] . ► Stingings in the hands and fingers, as of flies, [1] . ► Itching in the palms of the hands, [1] . ► Stitches, at times, in the right index; at times in the right thumb, [1] . ► Rheumatic pain extending from the lowest joint of the thumb, through the metacarpal bone, as far as the wrist-joint, [2] . ► Tearing in the muscles of the thumb, [2] . ► Trembling in the thumb, in the evening, in repeated short paroxysms, [1] . ► Tearing in the lowest joint of the left index-finger, [1] . [340.] ► (The lowest joints of the fingers become stiff in the evening, and the lowest joint of the thumb becomes swollen, and is then painful on being bent; this symptom is worse when she did not exercise her fingers during the day), [1] . ► Tearing in the right index-finger, [2] . ► Tearing in the last two fingers, in the evening, before falling asleep, [2] . ► Drawing in the fingers and the thumb, [1] . ► Tearing in tip of the little finger, [2] . ► Tearing under the nail of the right middle finger, [2] . ► The skin of the tips of the fingers becomes wrinkled early in the morning, [1] . ► The wart on the finger feels sore, [1] . ► Itching of the tips of the fingers, [1] . ► There arises an itching little tetter between the thumb and the index-finger, [1] . [350.] ► Lancinating pain in the tip of the left thumb; when touched only slightly, the part feels as if a splinter had been thrust under the nail; this feeling decreases when the part is pressed upon, [2] . ► Tingling in the tip of the thumb, as if it had gone to sleep; this symptom passes off, for some time, by pressing upon the parts, [2] . LOWER EXTREMITIES. ► Stretching and relaxation in the lower extremities, [1] . ► Feeling in the lower extremities as if they had gone to sleep; he has no firm step (after eight day), [1] . ► Tearing in the left, and afterwards in the right, hip, [2] . ► Tearing ache in front, just below the left hip, [2] . ► Sense as of a clucking tearing behind, under the left half of the nates, [1] . ► Tearing in the right half of the nates, [2] . ► Heaviness of the legs , [1] . ► Great lassitude in the legs, early in the morning, [1] . [360.] ► Rheumatic tearing in the right leg, [2] . ► Tearing in the left leg , early in the morning, [1] . ► Tension in the thigh, as if the tendons were too short, especially when walking, [1] . ► Tearing in the right knee, [2] . ► Drawing in the knees and the malleoli, [1] . ► Paralysis of the knee for a few minutes (after six days), [1] . ► Pain as from a sprain, above the knee, especially after having been seated (after five days), [1] . ► Itching of the knees, [1] . ► Stiffness of the bend of the knee, early in the morning (the first day), [1] . ► Soreness of the bends of the knees, which is most painful in the evening, [1] . [370.] ► Tearing under the left knee, in the upper part of the tibia, [2] . ► The legs, from the knee down, especially the feet, are very much swollen (after third day), [1] . ► There is more sensation of coldness in the legs than perceptible coldness, [1] . ► Itching of the legs, over the malleoli, in the evening, when lying down; after rubbing the parts they feel sore and as if bruised, [1] . ► During the menses the left leg becomes blue from distended veins, with a pressive pain, [1] . ► The right leg, especially the knee, is very cold, [1] . ► Tearing in the lower part of the left leg, [2] . ► Cramp in the legs, and, almost every night, cramp in the calves , [1] . ► Intermittent tearing in the left calf, [2] . ► Sense as of grumbling in the calves and feet, [1] . [380.] ► Painful spots on both shins (after twenty-eight day), [1] . ► Itching of the legs over the malleoli, in the evening, when lying down; after rubbing the parts they feel sore, and as if bruised, [1] . ► Tearing of the malleoli, [1] . ► Itching of the malleoli, [1] . ► Cold feet, [1] . ► Very cold feet, [2] . ► Weakness of the feet; they feel insensible (after forty-eight hours), [1] . ► Stiffness of the feet; they feel weary and exhausted (after sixth day), [1] . ► Tingling in the feet; they feel numb; after rising he felt like fainting; it became dark before his eyes; he could not remain up; had to vomit and lie down again, [1] . ► Arthritic pain in the articulations of the foot, [1] . [390.] ► When walking, pain in the articulation of the left foot, [1] . ► Tension in left foot (at noon), [1] . ► Tearing and stitches in the left foot (after twenty-six days), [1] . ► Occasional stitches in the left foot, [1] . ► Tearing in the external border of the left foot, [2] . ► Violent burning of the soles of the feet, [1] . ► Itching of the inside of the soles of the feet , which cannot be removed by scratching, [1] . ► Pain in the heel when walking, [1] . ► Stitches in the heel, [1] . ► Itching of the toes, [1] . [400.] ► Tearing in the middle toes of the left foot, [2] . ► Stitch in the ball of the big toe, [1] . ► Arthritic pain in the ball of the big toe, [1] . ► Intolerable tickling of the tip of the big toe, [1] . ► Pain of the corns; they feel sore, [1] . GENERALITIES. ► When walking in the open air an uneasiness in the blood and more rapid circulation, accompanied by greater weakness of the body, [1] . ► Early in the morning (in a room which was extremely heated) he suddenly felt so weak that he was not able to walk alone, hands and forehead being covered with a cold sweat, [1] . ► Weakness, early in the morning, when in bed, [2] . ► Weariness, with painful soreness of all the limbs, [1] . ► Lassitude, which disappears by walking (after fifth day), [1] . [410.] ► Heaviness in the body; he feels weary and exhausted (after fifth day), [1] . ► Failing of strength; the knees give way (after three hours), [1] . ► Very uneasy by day, [1] . ► The symptoms decrease by walking in the open air, but they return when sitting, [2] . SKIN. ► The eruption is reproduced upon the skin, with a good deal of itching, [1] . ► His tetters are reproduced, [1] . ► Burning in several places of the skin, [1] . ► Early, on waking, the skin feels numb, and is insensible as far as the knees, without being cold; the hands have but an indistinct sensation; the skin seems to have gone to sleep, but there is no tingling, [2] . ► Itching almost all over, even on the abdomen, [1] . ► Painful pimple on the forehead, [2] . [420.] ► Red pimple on middle of forehead, close to the hair; it feels sore when touched, but does not suppurate, [2] . ► Pimples and itching in the whiskers, [1] . ► Pimples on the face, without sensation, [1] . ► An itching pimple on the male parts of generation, [1] . ► Violent itching of the pudendum (less frequently of the anus); she has to rub the parts, [1] . ► The skin of the tips of the fingers becomes wrinkled, early in the morning, [1] . ► The wart on the finger feels sore, [1] . ► There arises an itching little tetter between the thumb and the index finger, [1] . ► Itching of the inside of the soles of the feet, which cannot be removed by scratching, [1] . ► Pain of the corns; they feel sore, [1] . FEVER. [430.] ► Internal chilliness at night, which prevents him from falling asleep, or which rouses him from sleep at night; he did not get warm, [1] . ► Chilliness and weariness, which gives him an inclination to go to sleep, four forenoons in succession; this symptom went off by taking some dinner (after seventy-two hours), [1] . ► Chilliness, sleepiness, weariness, and dull headache, ever since the morning; the headache disappeared when walking in the open air, [1] . ► Slight chills before dinner (first day), [1] . ► (Cold skin over the whole body, except face, neck, and genital organs), [1] . Heat two evenings in succession, from 7 to 8 o'clock (after twelve days), [1] . ► Heat in the face, and over the whole body, every quarter of an hour (after five or six days), [1] . ► Night sweat, two nights in succession (after six or seven days), [1] . ► Profuse night-sweat, two nights in succession (after five days), [1] . [440.] ► General perspiration, after midnight, for many nights, [1] . ► Profuse moisture, every night, almost like sweat, [1] . ► Moderate night-sweat, over and over, the whole body being very warm, [1] . ► Sweat every morning, worse on the affected side, [1] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Disposition to stretch, [1] . ► (Sleepiness by day), [1] . ► Sleeplessness before midnight, [1] . ► He cannot sleep at night, he knows not why, [1] . ► Sleeplessness for several nights; slumber early in the morning, which is full of fantasies, [1] . ► Frequent waking during the night, [2] . [450.] ► Frequent waking; about 2 o'clock in the night, a long-lasting uneasiness in the whole body, especially in the occiput, [1] . ► Falling asleep late; afterwards uneasy sleep, owing to a pressure in the epigastrium, especially on the right side, [2] . ► Pain over the eyes, with nausea, for several nights in succession, always after midnight, and lasting until 7 or 8 o'clock, [1] . ► Pressive tearing from the occiput to the forehead, in the evening when in bed, late after having fallen asleep, [2] . ► Heat in the head, the first half hour, [1] . ► Uneasiness in the occiput, after midnight, [1] . ► He wakes up at night with a headache; this goes off by rising from the bed, [1] . ► When waking up, he feels weak, his mouth is dry, there is a good deal of pressure in the epigastrium, which increases when lying upon the abdomen; when the pressure has disappeared, he feels a tearing in the small of the back, which disappears in its turn by lying upon the back, [2] . ► On waking, about midnight, there are the following symptoms: weakness, nausea, violent pressure in the pit of the stomach and in the abdomen, violent erections without any voluptuous sensation, dryness in the mouth and insensibility of the surface of the body, [2] . ► Waking early; this followed by a frequently interrupted, but very deep sleep, the eyes being tightly closed, [2] . [460.] ► Early in the morning, after waking, when in bed, he feels very weary, especially in the upper part of the body; there is confusion in the head, and a sensation as if the eyes had been tightly closed, accompanied by a little nausea in the pit of the stomach; he can scarcely prevail upon himself to rise, [2] . ► Weariness, early in the morning when in bed, with a sensation in the eyes as if they had been closed too tightly, [2] . ► At night, when asleep, he lies upon his back, with bent knees, the occiput being supported by both his hands; with very vivid dreams, [2] . ► Startings, as with fright, in the evening when falling asleep; he imagines that there is too much light in the room; he jumps out of his bed with a sort of anguish (after some hours), [1] . ► Uneasy sleep at night, owing to coldness of the body, and twitchings in all the limbs (after five days), [1] . ► Uneasiness for three nights in succession, with many dreams (after five days), [1] . ► Vivid, uneasy dreams come on the moment he falls asleep; they almost prevent him from sleeping (after eight days), [1] . ► The child's sleep is uneasy; it talks while asleep, and desires to drink, [1] . ► Uneasy sleep with anxious dreams (after five days), [1] . ► Uneasy dreams at night; they fill him with anguish, [2] . [470.] ► He falls asleep late; afterwards, he has anxious dreams, as if he were abused and too weak to defend himself; on waking, he feels a great weakness in the upper part of the body, accompanied by a pinching pressure under the pit of the stomach, nausea; these symptoms appear when lying down and falling asleep again, and are then accompanied by pressure in the left side of the abdomen; the symptoms, however, disappear when one is wide awake, sits up, and moves about; they terminate with the emission of flatulence, fermentation in the abdomen, and eructation, [2] . ► Vexing anxious dreams , and talking while asleep, for eight days (immediately), [1] . ► Dreams full of work, [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Headache; sweat. ► ( Early in morning ), Pain in eyes , etc.; tearing in right ear, etc.; bleeding at the nose ; hawking of mucus; weight in abdomen; increased urine; tearing in right arm; skin of finger-tips wrinkled; great lassitude in legs; tearing in left leg ; stiffness of bend of knee; great weakness, etc. ► ( Early on waking ), Tongue, etc., numb and dry; dryness of mouth; bitter taste in mouth; violent erections. ► ( Early after waking ), Badly smelling breath; skin feels numb, etc.; very weary, etc. ► ( Early in bed ), Sense of pinching in hypogastrium, etc.; weakness. ► ( Early after rising ), Urgent desire to urinate. ► ( Forenoon ), Vertigo; chilliness, etc. ► ( Noon ), Tension in left foot. ► ( Afternoon ), Vertigo; vertigo, etc.; roaring in the ear; insipid eructations; had to lie down, etc. ► ( Evening ), Sort of anguish ; pressure on top of head, etc.; stitches towards occiput; twitchings of face, etc.; pain in hollow tooth; sense as of spoiled stomach, etc.; twitchings in abdominal muscles; cutting colic; cough, etc.; drawing in shoulder, etc.; coldness of hands; trembling in the thumb; stiffness of finger-joints; soreness of bends of knees; heat. ► ( Evening before falling asleep ), Tearing in fingers. ► ( Evening in bed ), Pain in molar teeth; itching of legs; pressive tearing from occiput to forehead. ► ( Night ), Pressure below pit of stomach; frequent micturition ; profuse leucorrha; cough; twitching in all the limbs, etc.; right arm numb, etc.; cramp in the calves ; internal chilliness; sweat; profuse moisture; cannot sleep; headache; uneasiness; anxious dreams. ► ( Before midnight ), Sleepiness. ► ( After midnight ), General perspiration; pain over eyes; uneasiness in the occiput. ► ( On waking about midnight ), Weakness; nausea, etc. ► ( Soon after midnight ), Wakes with distended abdomen, etc. ► ( After midnight in bed ), Cutting colic. ► ( 2 A.M .), Long-lasting uneasiness, etc. ► ( Every other day ), Downward pressing pain in forehead. ► ( In open air ), Pain in hollow tooth. ► ( Walking in open air ), Vertigo; heartburn, etc.; palpitation of heart, etc.; uneasiness in the blood, etc. ► ( After draught of air ), Sore throat. ► ( After breakfast ), Nausea. ► ( Blowing nose ), Headache. ► ( Coughing ), Tickling in throat, etc. ► ( Before dinner ), Slight chills. ► ( During dinner ), Tearing in back part of throat, etc. ► ( After dinner ), Anxiety; pain in hollow tooth; pressure in pit of throat; violent eructations. ► ( Empty deglutition ), Sore throat. ► ( Drawing abdomen in ), Stitching pain around navel; prickings in hypogastrium. ► ( Drinking ), Tension and inflation of abdomen. ► ( After eating ), Confusion of head. ► ( After eructations ), Weakness about pit of stomach. ► ( After evacuation ), Pressure deep in hypogastrium . ► ( After two diarrha-like evacuations ), Chilliness. ► ( Exertion ), Lancinating and cutting headache. ► ( When not exercising the parts ), Stiffness of finger joints, etc. ► ( During strong expiration ), Pressure in right chest. ► ( Lying on abdomen ), Pressure in epigastrium. ► ( Lying on back ), Sense as of pinching in hypogastrium, etc. ► ( During a meal ), Feeling of contraction in salivary glands, etc. ► ( After a meal ), Shootings, etc.; tension and inflation of abdomen. ► ( During menses ), Left leg becomes blue, etc. ► ( Motion ), Confusion of the head; stitches in small of back. ► ( Moving tongue ), Pain in throat. ► ( Music ), Rush of blood to head. ► ( Pressure from without ), Sore throat; prickings in hypogastrium. ► ( After rising ), Feels like fainting. ► ( After rubbing the parts ), Soreness of legs, etc. ► ( Sitting ), Stitches in small of back; the symptoms. ► ( Sitting down ), Pressure in epigastrium. ► ( After having been seated ), Pain above knees. ► ( After hard stool ), Burning in genital organs. ► ( Slight touch ), Pain in tip of left thumb. ► ( After ineffectual urging ), Pinching pain in hypogastrium. ► ( When walking ), Tension in thigh; pain in articulation of left foot; pain in heel. ► ( After a walk ), Burning in genital organs. ► Amelioration. ► ( Walking in open air ), Pressure on epigastrium; the symptoms; headache. ► ( Taking dinner ), Chilliness, etc. ► ( After eating ), Oppression of chest, etc. ► ( Eructation ), Pressure and burning below pit of stomach; cutting in epigastrium; aching in chest. ► ( After lying down ), Headache. ► ( Lying upon back ), Tearing in small of back. ► ( After a meal ), Drawing pain in teeth. ► ( Pressure ), Pain in tip of left thumb; tingling in tip of thumb. ► ( Rising from bed ), Sense of pinching in hypogastrium, etc. ► ( Rubbing ), Itching and biting of the rectum. ► ( During sleep ), Accumulation of flatus, etc. ► ( Touch ), Pain in region of liver . ► ( Walking ), Lassitude. keynotes.text: A Text-Book of Materia Medica. (Characteristic, Analytical, and Comparative.) By Pr. Allen Corson Cowperthwaite, M. D., PH. D., LL. D. AMBRA. (AMBRA GRISEA.) Common name.- Ambergris . General Analysis.- Ambra acts directly upon the nervous system, producing superficial functional disturbances ; affecting especially the generative organs of the female, producing irritation of these parts, and giving rise to various forms of nervous and hysterical affections. Characteristic symptoms. Mind.- (Ambra grisea) Memory impaired ( Anac ., Kreos., Lach., Merc., Natr. mur., Nux m ., Phos. ac.) ; comprehension slow ; thinking difficult (Gels., Nux v., Phos.) ; melancholy. Anguish in the evening. Excited ; loquacious ; talking fatigues her ; was unable to sleep at night. Head.- (Ambra grisea) Must lie down on account of vertigo and feeling of weakness in the stomach. Tearing pain in left temple up to the vertex ; in right frontal eminence, and behind the left ear. Extremely painful tearing on top of head, and apparently in whole upper half of brain ; with paleness of face and coldness of left hand. Dullness and confusion in occiput. Music causes rush of blood to the head. Falling off of the hair. ( Graph ., Hep. s,, Natr. mur., Lach., Phos., Sep .) Eyes.- (Ambra grisea) Pain in the eyes as if they had been closed too firmly. Pressure upon the eyes. Itching of the eyelid as if a stye would form. Ears.- (Ambra grisea) Roaring and whistling in the ears, in afternoon. Music aggravates the cough ; produces congestion to the head. (Acon.) Hearing decreases. Nose.- (Ambra grisea) Bleeding - at the nose , early in the morning. (Agar., Bry .) Dried blood collects in the nose. Face.- (Ambra grisea) Flushes of heat in the face. Jaundiced color of the face. (Chel., Crot. t., Podo.) Mouth.- (Ambra grisea) Fetid odor from the mouth. ( Arn ., Hep. s., Iodi., Nitr. ac Merc ., Kreos.) Drawing pain in the teeth. Throat.- (Ambra grisea) Accumulation of grayish phlegm in the throat, which is difficult to hawk up ; accompanied by rawness. Sore throat after exposure to a draught of air (Bell.) ; stitches from throat to right ear ( Lach .), and pains particularly from motion of tongue ; sensation of rawness in region of velum palati. Stomach.- (Ambra grisea) Frequent empty or sour eructations. (Carb. v., Nux v., Phos., Sulph .) Heartburn with suppressed eructations. (Ars.) Pressure in stomach and hypochondria. Every evening, sensation as of spoiled stomach, and acrid risings up to the larynx. Abdomen.- (Ambra grisea) Sense of coldness in the abdomen . (Aethus., Camph.) Coldness of one side of the abdomen. Aching in region of liver. Stool.- (Ambra grisea) Frequent ineffectual desire for stool (Nux v.) ; this makes her very anxious ; at this time the presence of other persons becomes unbearable. Constipation. ( Alum , Bry ., Calc. c., Nux v., Op ., Phos.) Urinary Organs.- (Ambra grisea) The urine is turbid even while being emitted, depositing a brown sediment , the urine above being clear and yellow. (Ars.) Frequent micturition at night. (Borax, Phos. ac.) Female Organs.- (Ambra grisea) Violent itching of the pudendum (Canth., Kreos ., Merc., Sulph.) ; has to rub the parts. ( Kreos .) Soreness and itching, with swelling of the labia. Stitches in the ovarian region, when drawing in the abdomen or pressing upon it. Discharge of blood between the periods (Cact.) at every little accident, as after every hard stool, or after a walk. Menses too early and too profuse. (Aloe, Amm. c., Calc. c., Nux v.) Respiratory Organs.- (Ambra grisea) Violent spasmodic cough, with frequent eructations and hoarseness. Cough only at night, from irritation in throat. (Hyos,) Cough every evening, with pain under the left ribs, as if something were torn loose there. Whooping cough ; paroxysmal - but without crowing inspiration. Very saltish expectoration. (Carb. v., Lyc., Phos., Sep.) Sensation of pressure in the chest. Rawness in the chest. (Phos., Rumex .) Wheezing in the chest. Anxiety of the heart, causing oppression of breathing, with flushes of heat. ( Acon .) Upper Limbs.- (Ambra grisea) Tearing pain in the left shoulder joint. Drawing in the fingers and thumb. Lower Limbs.- (Ambra grisea) Heaviness of the legs. Cramp in the legs, and in the calves nearly every night. ( Sulph .) Itching of the inner border of the soles of the feet. Generalities.- (Ambra grisea) Sweat from slightest exertion. (Sep., Silicea .) Spasms and twitches in the muscular parts. (Agar., Cic.) Arms and limbs go to sleep easily. Great weakness and lassitude. ( Ars ., Cinch .) Sleep.- (Ambra grisea) Uneasy sleep, with vexatious, anxious dreams. Aggravation.- (Ambra grisea) In morning ; at night ; from warm drinks ; in warm room ; from reading or talking aloud ; from lying down ; from music. Amelioration.- (Ambra grisea) After eating ; from cold air ; from cold food and drinks. Therapeutic Range.- (Ambra grisea) In nervous and hysterical diseases, such as asthma, spasmodic cough, pertussis, pruritus, oophoritis, nymphomania, ranula. Conditions.- (Ambra grisea) In old people and children. In nervous persons , infants, or young people. In lean persons ; bilious and nervo-bilious temperaments. Compare.- (Ambra grisea) Ars., Asa f., Calc. c., Coccul., Coff. c., Ign., Lyc., Mosch., Nux v., Phos., Puls., Sep., Staph., Valer. Antidotes.- (Ambra grisea) Camph., Coff. c., Nux v., Puls., Staph.
